channel.title: Acclerator on Jie Xin
channel.description: Recent content in Acclerator on Jie Xin

item.title: ASPLOS'21 文章：DiAG: A Dataflow-Inspired Architecture for General-Purpose Processors分享
item.description: 论文题目：DiAG: A Dataflow-Inspired Architecture for General-Purpose Processors 作者信息： Dong Kai Wang, Ph.D in UICU, MS/BS in UICU. 主要研究近似体系结构，体系结构与编译融合 Nam Sung Kim, 体系结构方向大佬，冷静文的GPUW
